title: Legacy's end
body:
# Legacy's End
An unofficial fork of Re-Console based on the final version of Xbox 360 edition


# Summary
This modpack currently runs on L4J 1.7.10 and aims to faithfully replicate update aquatic as it was left at the end of the Xbox 360 and PS3 console edition life cycles.

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b80cdff9511a080cd5b8aee346211792518fa48.png)

# Features
- Accurate World Gen
- Good Performance
- Classic textures

# Credits
Datapacks not from modrinth include classic villages by Moyme: https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/classic-villages/
and multiple packs of my own creation accessible through paxi config folder.

# Not your cup of tea?
Want a version of console edition that never stopped going? Download the original Re-Console: https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft
